headline: What Kenvue (KVUE)'s Interim CFO Appointment Amid Expected Profit Growth Means For Shareholders
summary: On April 10, 2026, Kenvue Inc. appointed current Chief Accounting Officer Heather Howlett as interim Chief Financial Officer, effective May 12, 2026, making her the company’s principal financial officer during this interim period. This leadership shift in the finance function comes just as analysts expect double-digit bottom-line growth for Kenvue’s imminent first-quarter earnings release. We’ll now examine how anticipation of profit growth, alongside Heather Howlett’s interim CFO...

headline: Kimberly-Clark Sets Post Kenvue Merger Team As Valuation Draws Focus
summary: Kimberly-Clark (NasdaqGS:KMB) has outlined its leadership team and organizational structure for integrating Kenvue following their pending merger. The company detailed how key business segments will be grouped and managed once the transaction closes. This announcement gives investors an early look at how Kimberly-Clark plans to run the combined operations after the deal. Kimberly-Clark enters this transition with its shares at $97.85 and a value score of 4, alongside a 1 year return of a...
